title: 3 Stocks That Missed Q4 Estimates, But Are Still a Buy!

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities Can Withstand Years Of High Interest Rates
text: In this article, I explain why cap rates will not increase one-to-one with interest rates. And why some REITs are likely to continue to do well even during a prolonged period of high interest rates.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities: Be Selective With Entry Points Now
text: MAA is a leading rental apartment REIT and one that I have long recommended. Since my last buy call, it has risen almost 20%. The gain is good news, but super-charged returns usually give me pause. In this case, I see this double-digit gain as a reason for some caution.

title: Sunbelt Region Apartments: Bellwethers Provide Insights Into 2023
text: Sunbelt apartment companies Mid-America (MAA) and Camden Property Trust (CPT) each reported fourth quarter 2022 earnings late last week. MAA reported a modest “beat” to 4Q earnings and initiated FFO guidance for 2023, which implies a solid 7% growth in funds from operations (FFO).

title: 4 Top High-Yield Dividend Stocks to Buy in February
text: Given the likelihood of more rate hikes looming, stocks are sure to gyrate. Thus, invest in dividend players like Conagra Brands (CAG), S&T Bancorp (STBA) & BankFinancial (BFIN) for steady income.

title: UDR Q4 FFOA Meets Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Dividend Hiked
text: UDR's Q4 results reflect a year-over-year rise in revenues driven by healthy operating trends and past accretive external growth investments. It raises its annualized dividend payment for 2023.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Eric Bolton - Chairman and CEO Albert Campbell - Executive VP, CFO Rob DelPriore - Executive VP, CAO and General Counsel Brad Hill - Executive VP, Chief Investment Officer Tim Argo - Executive VP, Chief Strategy and Analysis Officer Andrew Schaeffer - Senior VP, Treasurer and Director of Capital Markets Conference Call Participants Nick Yulico - Scotiabank Alexander Goldfarb - Piper Sandler Austin Wurschmidt - KeyBanc Capital Nick Joseph - Citi Anthony Powell - Barclays Chandni Luthra - Goldman Sachs Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Rich Anderson - SMBC Wes Golladay - Baird Rob Stevenson - Janney Michael Goldsmith - UBS John Pawlowski - Green Street Tayo Okusanya - Credit Suisse Jamie Feldman - Wells Fargo Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to the MAA Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Earnings Conference Call. During the presentation, all participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Mid-America Apartment (MAA) Tops on Q4 FFO & Revenue Estimates
text: Mid-America Apartment's (MAA) Q4 core FFO & revenues outpace estimates. Results reflect an increase in the average effective rent per unit for the same-store portfolio.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Surpasses Q4 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 1.75% and 0.47%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
